name: Stephen Shires

contactInfo.office: 200 San Augustine St., Suite 300, Center, TX 75935

bio: Stephen Shires serves as the District Attorney for Shelby County, prosecuting felony criminal cases in the Center area. He works to uphold justice and ensure public safety for all Shelby County residents.
campaignPromises: Aggressively prosecute violent crime in Shelby County
Combat drug trafficking in the Deep East Texas region
Support victims' rights throughout the legal process
Maintain transparency and accountability in the DA's office
Strengthen partnerships with local law enforcement agencies
